chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No. S- 420 of 2022 (Zulfiqar Ali and another v. The State) Crl. Bail Application No. S- 460 of 2022 (Hadi Bux and another v. The State) For the Applicants: Applicants Zulfiqar Ali and Gulzar Ali (Crl.B.A.No.S-420 of 2022), Hadi Bux and Nizakat Ali (Crl.B.A.No.S-640 of 2022) along with their Advocate Mr. Manzoor Hussain Halepoto. For the complainant: Mr. Ghulam Abbas Shah, Advocate a/w complainant. For the State: Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G. Date(s) of Hearing: 06-02-2023 Date of Order: 06-02-2023 O R D E R Zafar Ahmed Rajput, J. - In compliance of order dated 30.01.2023; copy of final charge-sheet is submitted by Inspector Ghulam Shabbir Khuhro under the covering letter/report of SSP, Khairpur, which is taken on record. 2. Through instant Crl. Bail Applications, the applicants Zulfiqar Ali and Gulzar Ali (Crl. B.A. No. S- 420 of 2022), Hadi Bux and Nizakat Ali (Crl. B.A. No. S- 640 of 2022) seek pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 39 of 2022, registered at P.S, Kotdiji-Khairpur, under Sections 302, 337A(i), 337F(i), 147, 148, 149 & 504 PPC. Their earlier Crl. Pre-Arrest Bail Application No. 1064 of 2022 was heard and dismissed by leaned Sessions Judge, Kharipur vide order dated 29.06.2022. The applicants were admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide orders dated 02.09.2022 and 05.12.2022 respectively, now the matters are fixed for confirmation of the same or otherwise. Crl. B.A.No.S-420 & 640 of 2022 Page 2 of 2 3. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and the complainant, who is present in person, has forgiven the applicants in the name of Almighty ALLAH and proper applications under Sections 345 and Cr.P.C shall be filed before the trial Court seeking permission to compound the offence as well as for acquittal of the accused persons.

B.A.No.S-420 & 640 of 2022 Page 2 of 2 3. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and the complainant, who is present in person, has forgiven the applicants in the name of Almighty ALLAH and proper applications under Sections 345 and Cr.P.C shall be filed before the trial Court seeking permission to compound the offence as well as for acquittal of the accused persons. However, he has recorded his no objection to the confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicants by this Court. 4. Considering the fact that the parties have entered into settlement and to give effect to such settlement, proper compromise applications are likely to be filed before the trial Court, hence interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicants by this Court, vide orders 02.09.2022 and 05.12.2022 respectively are hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 5. Needless to mention here that the observations made herein-above are tentative in nature and would not influence the trial Court while deciding the case of applicants on merits and if the applicants in any manner try to misuse the concession of bail, it would be open for the trial Court to cancel the same after issuing them the requisite notice. The instant Crl. Bail Applications stand allowed in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. J U D G E Ahmad
